criteria._comment: Qualifying criteria for a morel foraging day. A day 'qualifies' if ALL conditions are met. A 'window' is 3+ consecutive qualifying days. Temperatures in °F, rainfall in inches.

burns.name: Lower Sugarloaf + Second Creek
burns.notes: Combo of Lower Sugarloaf (~42,980 ac) + Second Creek (~80 ac)

burns.name: Pomas Fire
burns.location: 36 mi NW of Entiat, Glacier Peak

burns.name: Bear Gulch + Hamma Hamma
burns.notes: Combo of Bear Gulch (~20,200 ac) + Hamma Hamma (~65 ac). Low elevation — earliest window.

burns.name: Pioneer Fire
burns.location: Lake Chelan, N shore near Stehekin
